role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The assets of the fund include only gold bullion and cash, if any. The fund is not a proxy for investing in physical gold. Rather, the Shares are intended to provide a cost-effective means of obtaining investment exposure through the securities markets that is similar to an investment in gold.
